tasks.label: PM: Flash+Monitor 7-inch
args: setopt NULL_GLOB; ports=(/dev/cu.wchusbserial* /dev/cu.usbserial* /dev/cu.usbmodem*); if (( ${#ports[@]} == 0 )); then echo 'No serial port found'; exit 1; fi; PORT=${ports[1]}; echo "Using $PORT"; . /Users/eric/.espressif/tools/activate_idf_v5.5.3.sh; /Users/eric/.espressif/tools/python/v5.5.3/venv/bin/python /Users/eric/.espressif/v5.5.3/esp-idf/tools/idf.py -B build -p "$PORT" flash monitor

tasks.label: PM: Flash+Monitor 5-inch
args: setopt NULL_GLOB; ports=(/dev/cu.wchusbserial* /dev/cu.usbserial* /dev/cu.usbmodem*); if (( ${#ports[@]} == 0 )); then echo 'No serial port found'; exit 1; fi; PORT=${ports[1]}; echo "Using $PORT"; . /Users/eric/.espressif/tools/activate_idf_v5.5.3.sh; PM_P4_BOARD=elecrow_p4_5 /Users/eric/.espressif/tools/python/v5.5.3/venv/bin/python /Users/eric/.espressif/v5.5.3/esp-idf/tools/idf.py -B build-p4-5-codex -p "$PORT" flash monitor
